testcase.name: Security scan: test_false_positives.ps1

error.message: [CRITICAL] dynamic_secret_hex_high_entropy_string at line 6: Dynamic credential detection: Hex High Entropy String

testcase.error: Rule: dynamic_secret_hex_high_entropy_string Severity: CRITICAL CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: High entropy string or pattern detected (Hex High Entropy String) Remediation: Move to Azure Key Vault or SCCM Task Sequence Variable.

testcase.name: Security scan: PSADT.ClientServer.Client.exe.config

error.message: [CRITICAL] dynamic_secret_hex_high_entropy_string at line 6: Dynamic credential detection: Hex High Entropy String

testcase.error: Rule: dynamic_secret_hex_high_entropy_string Severity: CRITICAL CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: High entropy string or pattern detected (Hex High Entropy String) Remediation: Move to Azure Key Vault or SCCM Task Sequence Variable.

failure.message: [HIGH] hemspect_xml_password_attribute at line 6: HemSpect: XML/Config attribute with credential value

testcase.failure: Rule: hemspect_xml_password_attribute Severity: HIGH CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: Token="b03f****" Remediation: Remove embedded credential. Use a secrets vault (Azure Key Vault / SCCM TS Variables).

testcase.name: Security scan: PSAppDeployToolkit.psm1

failure.message: [HIGH] privilege_escalation_api at line 476: Malware indicator: privilege_escalation_api

testcase.failure: Rule: privilege_escalation_api Severity: HIGH CVSS Score: 7.5 MITRE: T1068 CWE: CWE-506 Match: SeDebugPrivilege Remediation: BLOCK PACKAGE - IMMEDIATE SECURITY INVESTIGATION REQUIRED

testcase.name: Security scan: PSADT.ClientServer.Client.Launcher.exe.config

error.message: [CRITICAL] dynamic_secret_hex_high_entropy_string at line 6: Dynamic credential detection: Hex High Entropy String

testcase.error: Rule: dynamic_secret_hex_high_entropy_string Severity: CRITICAL CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: High entropy string or pattern detected (Hex High Entropy String) Remediation: Move to Azure Key Vault or SCCM Task Sequence Variable.

failure.message: [HIGH] hemspect_xml_password_attribute at line 6: HemSpect: XML/Config attribute with credential value

testcase.failure: Rule: hemspect_xml_password_attribute Severity: HIGH CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: Token="b03f****" Remediation: Remove embedded credential. Use a secrets vault (Azure Key Vault / SCCM TS Variables).

testcase.name: Security scan: test_passwords.ps1

error.message: [CRITICAL] hardcoded_credential at line 9: Hardcoded password literal found in script variable

testcase.error: Rule: hardcoded_credential Severity: CRITICAL CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: $password = 'Pr0duction_DB_P@ss!' Remediation: Move secrets to SCCM TS Variable (mark Private) or Azure Key Vault

error.message: [CRITICAL] secure_string_plaintext at line 15: SecureString constructed from plaintext with -AsPlainText -Force

testcase.error: Rule: secure_string_plaintext Severity: CRITICAL CVSS Score: 8.1 MITRE: T1552 CWE: CWE-312 Match: ConvertTo-SecureString "D3ploy_S3cret!" -AsPlainText -Force Remediation: Remove -AsPlainText -Force; use DPAPI or managed credential store

error.message: [CRITICAL] password_string at line 6: Hardcoded password literal in script

testcase.error: Rule: password_string Severity: CRITICAL CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: Password = "Service@ccount#2024!" Remediation: Move to Azure Key Vault, SCCM Task Sequence Variable (Private), or Windows Credential Manager. Never hardcode secrets in scripts.

error.message: [CRITICAL] password_string at line 9: Hardcoded password literal in script

testcase.error: Rule: password_string Severity: CRITICAL CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: password = 'Pr0duction_DB_P@ss!' Remediation: Move to Azure Key Vault, SCCM Task Sequence Variable (Private), or Windows Credential Manager. Never hardcode secrets in scripts.

error.message: [CRITICAL] secure_string_plaintext at line 15: SecureString from plaintext — password fully exposed in source

testcase.error: Rule: secure_string_plaintext Severity: CRITICAL CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: ConvertTo-SecureString "D3ploy_S3cret!" -AsPlainText -Force Remediation: Move to Azure Key Vault, SCCM Task Sequence Variable (Private), or Windows Credential Manager. Never hardcode secrets in scripts.

error.message: [CRITICAL] connection_string_password at line 12: Database connection string with embedded password

testcase.error: Rule: connection_string_password Severity: CRITICAL CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: connStr = "Data Source=SQL01;Initial Catalog=PowerBI;User ID=pbi_admin;Password=PBI#Admin2024" Remediation: Move to Azure Key Vault, SCCM Task Sequence Variable (Private), or Windows Credential Manager. Never hardcode secrets in scripts.

error.message: [CRITICAL] bearer_token at line 18: JWT Bearer token detected

testcase.error: Rule: bearer_token Severity: CRITICAL CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIxMjM0NTY3ODkwIn0.dozjgNryP4J3jVmNHl0w5N_XgL0n3I9PlFUP0THsR8U Remediation: Move to Azure Key Vault, SCCM Task Sequence Variable (Private), or Windows Credential Manager. Never hardcode secrets in scripts.

error.message: [CRITICAL] hemspect_sql_conn_string at line 12: HemSpect: SQL Connection String with embedded password

testcase.error: Rule: hemspect_sql_conn_string Severity: CRITICAL CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: Data Source=SQL01;Initial Catalog=PowerBI;User ID=pbi_admin;Password=PBI#****" Remediation: Remove embedded credential. Use a secrets vault (Azure Key Vault / SCCM TS Variables).

failure.message: [HIGH] hemspect_xml_password_attribute at line 6: HemSpect: XML/Config attribute with credential value

testcase.failure: Rule: hemspect_xml_password_attribute Severity: HIGH CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: Password = "Serv****" Remediation: Remove embedded credential. Use a secrets vault (Azure Key Vault / SCCM TS Variables).

error.message: [CRITICAL] hemspect_ps_securestring_plaintext at line 15: HemSpect: ConvertTo-SecureString with plaintext input

testcase.error: Rule: hemspect_ps_securestring_plaintext Severity: CRITICAL CVSS Score: 9.1 MITRE: T1552.001 CWE: CWE-798 Match: ConvertTo-SecureString "D3ploy_S3cret!" -AsPlainText Remediation: Remove embedded credential. Use a secrets vault (Azure Key Vault / SCCM TS Variables).

testcase.name: Security scan: Terraform_UserSetup.ps1

failure.message: [HIGH] psadt_unvalidated_path at line 5: PSADT file/process cmdlet with non-ADT variable path - potential path traversal

testcase.failure: Rule: psadt_unvalidated_path Severity: HIGH CVSS Score: 6.5 MITRE: T1083 CWE: CWE-22 Match: Copy-ADTFile -Path "$env:ProgramData\Terraform_User_Level_Install\terraform.exe" -Destination $ Remediation: Validate all path parameters against known safe prefixes
